task_completion.description: Add the core-splashscreen dependency to the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A build.gradle or build.gradle.kts file is open showing the 'androidx.core:core-splashscreen' dependency (version 1.0.1 or newer) added to the dependencies block.

task_completion.description: Create the Theme.App.Starting theme inheriting from Theme.SplashScreen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A themes.xml or styles.xml file is open showing a new style declaration with name='Theme.App.Starting' and parent='Theme.SplashScreen'.

task_completion.description: Configure the splash screen theme attributes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the Theme.App.Starting style, there are items setting windowSplashScreenBackground to #FFFFFF, windowSplashScreenAnimatedIcon to @mipmap/ic_launcher, and postSplashScreenTheme to @style/Theme.SunriseApp.

task_completion.description: Configure the application to use the new splash screen theme at launch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The AndroidManifest.xml file is open showing the android:theme attribute set to '@style/Theme.App.Starting' in the <application> or MainActivity <activity> tag.

task_completion.description: Initialize the splash screen in MainActivity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The MainActivity.kt (or .java) file is open showing a call to 'installSplashScreen()' inside the onCreate method, placed before the 'setContentView' call.

integrity.description: The agent used an IDE (like Android Studio) or a proper text editor to modify the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the files being edited in an IDE or text editor interface, rather than just terminal commands echoing text into files.

integrity.description: The agent edited the files within the SunriseApp project.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths or project explorer in the IDE indicate the project is 'SunriseApp' (e.g., /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/SunriseApp).

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the Android project files rather than writing a summary text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The edits are made in actual .gradle, .xml, and .kt/.java files, not a generic text file containing the answers.
